title: Add contract-respecting question generation (Golden Test 16)
problem: ticket-017 produces candidate theories with next questions, but active vs parked follow-up question generation is not yet contract-gated. Golden Test 16 requires useful on-scope questions and parked off-scope questions with reasons.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 16: new question generation respects research contract.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic generation of on-scope and parked follow-up questions from cluster/theory context without Ollama.
Active questions queue with contract validation; off-scope questions parked with machine-readable reasons.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph or live web discovery.
Do not add public write routes.
